title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BOLOBOLO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JABONGA, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN, TO SAN VICENTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 861 / 55 OG No. 22, 4014 (June 1, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2160, April 24, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BOLOBOLO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JABONGA, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN, TO SAN VICENTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Bolobolo in the Municipality of Jabonga, Province of Agusan, is changed to San Vicente.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 24, 1959.
